info.title: Welcome to RapidFire CLI
info.description:
Installing RapidFire Templates .....
The colon separator "::" has been deprecated in favor of the at symbol "@" for separating the package from the version in dotnet new install. In your case, this means RapidFireTemplates@1.0.3 instead of RapidFireTemplates::1.0.3.
The following template packages will be installed:
RapidFireTemplates@1.0.3
Success: RapidFireTemplates@1.0.3 installed the following templates:
Template Name                      Short Name  Language  Tags
---------------------------------  ----------  --------  -----------------
RapidFire .NET Api Application     rfapi       [C#]      Blazor/Api
RapidFire .NET Domain Application  rfdomain    [C#]      C#/Domain
RapidFire .NET Portal Application  rfportal    [C#]      Blazor/Web/Portal
RapidFire .NET Test Application    rftest      [C#]      Blazor/Test
RapidFire .NET Web Application     rfweb       [C#]      Blazor/Web
No templates found matching: 'rfapi'.
To search for the templates on NuGet.org, run:
dotnet new search rfapi
For details on the exit code, refer to https://aka.ms/templating-exit-codes#103
Creating new RapidFire project.....
Unhandled exception. System.IndexOutOfRangeException: Index was outside the bounds of the array.
at rfc.Program.ProcessCommand(String[] args) in C:\Projects\.NET\devops-rf\rfc\Program.cs:line 32
at rfc.Program.Main(String[] args) in C:\Projects\.NET\devops-rf\rfc\Program.cs:line 26
